languages.text: "Лишь немногие остались доживать последние циклы вместе с родным миром. В том числе моя матушка — Вего-Ан. Именно она собрала всех этих людей, нарекла лучших из соратников Старейшинами и дала шанс Детям Искупления обрести спасение. После ее смерти я ношу ее имя и маску — по закону крови".

traits.locale_text: "Лишь немногие остались доживать последние циклы вместе с родным миром. В том числе моя матушка — Вего-Ан. Именно она собрала всех этих людей, нарекла лучших из соратников Старейшинами и дала шанс Детям Искупления обрести спасение. После ее смерти я ношу ее имя и маску — по закону крови".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "Few left to witness the last few cycles of the dying world. My mother, Vego-An, was among them. It was her who gathered these people and named the most worthy among them the Elders, thus giving Children of Redemption one final chance for salvation. I took her name and her mask after she died — for such is the law of blood."
languages.original_text: "Лишь немногие остались доживать последние циклы вместе с родным миром. В том числе моя матушка — Вего-Ан. Именно она собрала всех этих людей, нарекла лучших из соратников Старейшинами и дала шанс Детям Искупления обрести спасение. После ее смерти я ношу ее имя и маску — по закону крови".

traits.locale_text: "Few left to witness the last few cycles of the dying world. My mother, Vego-An, was among them. It was her who gathered these people and named the most worthy among them the Elders, thus giving Children of Redemption one final chance for salvation. traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "Nur wenige sind geblieben, um die letzten Zyklen der sterbenden Welt zu erleben. Meine Mutter, Vego-An, war unter ihnen. Sie war es, die diese Menschen versammelte und die Würdigsten unter ihnen zu den Ältesten ernannte und so den Kindern der Erlösung eine letzte Chance auf Erlösung gab. Nach ihrem Tod nahm ich ihren Namen und ihre Maske an — denn so ist das Gesetz des Blutes."
languages.original_text: "Few left to witness the last few cycles of the dying world. My mother, Vego-An, was among them. It was her who gathered these people and named the most worthy among them the Elders, thus giving Children of Redemption one final chance for salvation. I took her name and her mask after she died — for such is the law of blood."

languages.text: "Peu de gens sont restés pour assister aux derniers cycles du monde mourant. Ma mère, Végo-An, était parmi eux. C'est elle qui a rassemblé ces gens et nommé les plus dignes d'entre eux les Anciens, donnant ainsi aux Enfants de la Rédemption une dernière chance de salut. Après sa mort, j'ai pris son nom et son masque, car telle est la loi du sang."
languages.original_text: "Few left to witness the last few cycles of the dying world. My mother, Vego-An, was among them. It was her who gathered these people and named the most worthy among them the Elders, thus giving Children of Redemption one final chance for salvation. I took her name and her mask after she died — for such is the law of blood."

languages.text: "很少有人能见证这个垂死世界的最后几个轮回。我的母亲维歌安也在其中。正是她召集了这些人，并将其中最有价值的人任命为长老，从而给了救赎之子最后一次救赎的机会。她死后，我继承了她的名字和面具--因为这就是血的法则。
languages.original_text: "Few left to witness the last few cycles of the dying world. My mother, Vego-An, was among them. It was her who gathered these people and named the most worthy among them the Elders, thus giving Children of Redemption one final chance for salvation. I took her name and her mask after she died — for such is the law of blood."

languages.text: "Pocos se fueron para presenciar los últimos ciclos del mundo moribundo. Mi madre, Vego-An, estaba entre ellos. Fue ella quien reunió a estas personas y nombró Ancianos a los más dignos, dando así a los Hijos de la Redención una última oportunidad de salvación. Tomé su nombre y su máscara después de su muerte, porque así es la ley de la sangre".
languages.original_text: "Few left to witness the last few cycles of the dying world. My mother, Vego-An, was among them. It was her who gathered these people and named the most worthy among them the Elders, thus giving Children of Redemption one final chance for salvation. I took her name and her mask after she died — for such is the law of blood."

languages.text: 「滅びゆく世界の最後の数サイクルを目撃するために残った者はほとんどいない。私の母、ベゴ＝アンもその一人だった。贖罪の子らに救済の最後のチャンスを与えたのだ。母の死後、私はその名と仮面を受け継いだ。
languages.original_text: "Few left to witness the last few cycles of the dying world. My mother, Vego-An, was among them. It was her who gathered these people and named the most worthy among them the Elders, thus giving Children of Redemption one final chance for salvation. I took her name and her mask after she died — for such is the law of blood."

languages.text: "Ölmekte olan dünyanın son birkaç döngüsüne tanıklık edecek çok az kişi kaldı. Annem Vego-An da onların arasındaydı. Bu insanları toplayan ve aralarından en değerli olanları İhtiyarlar olarak adlandıran oydu, böylece Kefaretin Çocuklarına kurtuluş için son bir şans verdi. O öldükten sonra onun adını ve maskesini aldım — çünkü kan kanunu böyledir."
languages.original_text: "Few left to witness the last few cycles of the dying world. My mother, Vego-An, was among them. It was her who gathered these people and named the most worthy among them the Elders, thus giving Children of Redemption one final chance for salvation. I took her name and her mask after she died — for such is the law of blood."
